name: Hawkeye Breeders Service
notes: Dominant Wagyu semen storage and collection center; USDA export-qualified isolation facility.

name: Trans Ova Genetics
notes: Full-service bovine reproduction: IVF, embryo transfer, storage, and cloning (parent of ViaGen livestock work).

name: Bovine Elite LLC
notes: Long-established bull stud and semen marketing/storage house with strong Wagyu sire inventory.

name: Champion Genetics
notes: Custom bull collection and semen storage; handles numerous private Wagyu sires.

name: Elgin Breeding Service
notes: Semen collection, processing, and frozen storage serving Texas seedstock producers.

name: Great Lakes Sires
notes: Midwest bull collection and frozen semen storage facility.

name: SEK Genetics
notes: Southeast Kansas bull stud offering collection, distribution, and long-term semen storage.

name: ORIgen Inc.
notes: Beef-focused genetics company with collection and CSS-qualified storage capability.

name: STgenetics (Sexing Technologies)
notes: Sexed-semen leader with large-scale collection, IVF, and export-qualified storage.

name: Genex (URUS Group)
notes: Cooperative bull stud within URUS; broad semen storage and international distribution.

name: Premier Reproductive Services
notes: Embryo transfer, IVF, and on-farm reproductive services with tank storage.

name: ViaGen Pets & Equine / ViaGen Livestock
notes: The livestock cloning leader and genetic-preservation (tissue banking) service; now a Trans Ova division.

name: Bovance
notes: Bovine cloning joint venture between Trans Ova Genetics and ViaGen.

name: Clone International
notes: Australian livestock cloning company licensing SCNT technology for elite cattle.

name: In Vitro Brasil (ABS/Genus)
notes: One of the world's largest commercial IVF/embryo producers; cloning and embryo storage, part of ABS/Genus.

name: Agri-Gene Pty Ltd
notes: Independent Australian bull collection and semen storage/distribution business.

name: Genetics Australia
notes: Farmer-owned cooperative bull stud; collection, storage, and export of frozen genetics.

name: ABS Australia (Genus plc)
notes: Australian arm of ABS Global; semen distribution and storage for beef and dairy genetics.

name: Total Livestock Genetics
notes: Independent Australian stud with strong Wagyu sire lineup and export storage.

name: Semex
notes: Canadian genetics cooperative with global semen storage and distribution network.

name: Alta Genetics (URUS Group)
notes: Global bull stud within URUS; collection and export-qualified frozen storage.

name: ABS Global
notes: Genus-owned global bull stud; large-scale collection and export-qualified storage.

name: Select Sires Inc.
notes: Largest US A.I. cooperative; collection, distribution, and frozen semen storage.
